sourceRef: tip:A small change that cuts student email in half

slides.headline: Unlock Effortless Certification
slides.body: Empower your team to focus on student needs, not paperwork.

slides.headline: Automate Certifications
slides.body: Streamline the process of verifying student eligibility.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Maintain up-to-date records of student eligibility.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Ensure your students receive the benefits they deserve.

slides.headline: ComplianceMatters
slides.body: Stay compliant with VA regulations and requirements.

slides.headline: YellowRibbon
slides.body: Enable your students to access additional educational benefits.
bullets: Resource library for VA education benefits

outline.caption: Empower your VA School Certifying Official role with VASCO Assistant Pro. Streamline certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans. Ready to try it out? Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Support Student Veterans' slide could benefit from a more detailed headline to better convey the specific benefits.
